metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4844
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1, 2, table 1: RAB11 was identified in biochemical enrichment of neuronal endosomes.

Figure 5, 6: immunofluerescence imaging showed RAB11 co-localized with presynaptic marker proteins, constitutively active Rab11 (Rab11Q70L) was recruited to nerve terminals and facilitates activity-dependent bulk endocytosis.

Authors concluded that "Rab11Q70L preferentially localizes to nerve terminals, as does endogenous Rab11 (SI Appendix, Fig. S13).". Experimental description: supplemental M&M: "Primary cultures of cerebellar granule neurons (CGNs) were prepared from the cerebella of 7 day old Sprague Dawley rat pups of both sexes as described"

to disambiguate "Rab11"; table 1 reports Rab11a (P62494), the streetname of Rab11a is Rab11
